overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player crosses a neon-lit street, walks along a sidewalk beneath holographic billboards, passes through a covered urban underpass with red ambient lighting, and emerges into a plaza with a transit station. The scene features dense cyberpunk architecture with glowing signage and futuristic urban elements.

finishing street crossing and stepping onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection and continuing along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a neon-lit urban intersection at night. The player crosses a striped crosswalk past a waiting black van, with a prominent red 'CONBATAKAS' billboard visible on the right and the 'Masala Studios' sign on the left. Various pedestrians populate the sidewalks as the camera moves from the asphalt crossing onto the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with commercial storefronts approaching overhead transit structure

events.description: approaching the entrance to the covered underpass ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward the overpass structure

notable_agents.action: person in yellow shirt and shorts jogging past on the left side

entered.detail: elevated transit track or bridge spanning across the street ahead
tall palm trees in large concrete planters along the sidewalk
yellow and black striped metal barriers blocking off areas

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk, the camera moves toward a large overpass structure that spans the street. The Masala Studios sign recedes into the distance on the left while palm trees and construction barricades line the right side. The environment remains open to the night sky with neon illumination from surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under transit structure with red neon lighting

events.description: entering the covered walkway from the open street
ambient lighting shifts to darker red neon tones from overhead fixtures

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered pedestrian passage with red ambient lighting

notable_agents.action: character with red mohawk hair interacting with a glowing vending machine

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with exposed beams and industrial ventilation systems
large circular industrial ventilation fans mounted overhead
rows of red neon tube lights running along the ceiling
brightly illuminated vending machines with various products and advertisements
rolled down corrugated metal shutters on closed storefronts

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered pedestrian walkway beneath the transit structure. The environment becomes sheltered with a concrete ceiling featuring large ventilation fans and rows of red neon lights casting a crimson glow. Vending machines and closed storefronts with metal shutters line the right side while pedestrians walk ahead toward the distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with transit station entrance and California Ave sign

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into the open plaza area
approaching the California Ave transit station stairs

agents.ego_description: walking toward the California Ave transit station in the open plaza

entered.detail: illuminated green sign reading 'California Ave' above the transit entrance
stairs and entrance structure for the elevated transit station
wide open paved plaza area with scattered pedestrians and ambient lighting

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a spacious plaza with the 'California Ave' transit station visible ahead. The environment transitions from the enclosed red-lit passage to an open area with mixed lighting. The camera approaches the station stairs as other pedestrians move through the plaza, with the digital billboard now visible in the far left background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit urban district that transitions from an open street intersection into a sheltered underpass before emerging into a transit plaza. It begins by crossing a striped intersection past a black van, moving between the glowing Masala Studios and CONBATAKAS signs as the camera shifts from the asphalt onto a concrete sidewalk. As the camera advances, the open night sky and roadside palm trees give way to a massive overpass structure that swallows the view. The scene then shifts into a covered pedestrian walkway, where the lighting transforms into a deep crimson glow cast by rows of red neon lights and overhead ventilation fans. Finally, the camera exits the enclosed passage, opening into a spacious plaza as it approaches the stairs of the California Ave transit station under a mix of ambient city lights.
